earlyGuidance:
1 week before due date
(Note: after completing full initiation process)

lateGuidance._comment: initiationTiers = days since first 234 mg initiation dose; maintenanceTiers = days since last monthly dose

guidance.idealSteps: The 156 mg is either not due or not significantly overdue. Proceed with original plans and orders.
guidance.pragmaticVariations: No variations needed - proceed with standard protocol.

guidance.idealSteps:
(1) Administer 156 mg (in deltoid ideally).

(2) Arrange for a 117 mg injection 5 weeks after the first (234 mg) injection, regardless of when the 156 mg injection (in step 1) is administered

(3) Thereafter, start monthly maintenance dosing 4 weeks after step 2.
guidance.pragmaticVariations: Ok to administer the 156 mg injection in gluteal muscle if patient strongly prefers.
guidance.providerNotification: Post-injection (156 mg): Notify provider of the situation and need to order a 117 mg injection if not already done.

guidance.idealSteps:
(1) Administer 156 mg (in deltoid ideally).

(2) Arrange for a 2nd 156 mg injection (in deltoid ideally) 1 week after step 1.

(3) Thereafter, start monthly maintenance dosing 4 weeks after step 2.
guidance.pragmaticVariations: Ok to administer the 156 mg injection in gluteal muscle if patient strongly prefers.
guidance.providerNotification: Post-injection (1st 156 mg): Notify provider of the situation and need to order a 2nd 156 mg injection if not already done.

guidance.idealSteps:
(1) Restart initiation: Administer a 234 mg injection if available

(2) Arrange for a 156 mg injection 1 week after step 1.

(3) Thereafter, start monthly maintenance dosing 4 weeks after step 2.
guidance.pragmaticVariations: Ok to administer the 156 mg injection at time of patient presentation if a 234 mg injection is not available and arrange for the patient to return in 1 week.
guidance.providerNotification: Post-injection: notify provider of situation and for orders and guidance on next steps

guidance.idealSteps: Consult provider to get orders to proceed
The maintenance injection is not significantly overdue (less than 4 weeks since last injection). Proceed with administering the usual maintenance dose and continue with normal monthly schedule.
guidance.pragmaticVariations: No variations needed - proceed with standard protocol.
guidance.providerNotification: No provider notification needed for routine administration.

guidance.idealSteps:
(1) Administer usual Invega Sustenna dose.

(2) Arrange for next usual monthly maintenance dose = 4 weeks later.

156-or-less.idealSteps:
(1) Administer usual maintenance dose.

(2) Arrange for a 2nd usual maintenance dose (same dose) to be administered 1 week later.

(3) Then resume usual monthly doses 4 weeks after step 2.
156-or-less.pragmaticVariations: For step (2), ok if the 2nd usual maintenance dose happens anytime 1 week or beyond. Attempt to return to a monthly cycle after the 2nd usual maintenance dose.
156-or-less.providerNotification: Post-injection: Notify provider of the need to have a 2nd usual maintenance dose ordered.

234.idealSteps:
(1) Administer 156 mg Invega Sustenna

(2) Arrange for another 156 mg injection to be administered 1 week later

(3) Then resume usual monthly doses with 234 mg at 4 weeks after step 2.
234.pragmaticVariations: If a 156 mg Invega Sustenna injection is not available at the time the patient presents, give the 234 mg injection. Notify the provider to guide next steps.
234.providerNotification:
Post-injection: Notify provider of the situation. If ideal steps are followed, a 2nd 156 mg injection may need to be ordered.

If the pragmatic variation was followed, the provider will guide next steps.

guidance.idealSteps: Consult provider: reinitiation will need to happen
